name: overlay-playwright-runtime
description: Installable Codex skill for adopting and operating the a11y-overlay runtime in Playwright workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Adopt a11y-overlay or run it in a persistent Playwright session.
interface.longDescription: Packages the overlay-playwright-runtime skill so Codex users can vendor a11y-overlay into other repos or operate it live in persistent Playwright desktop and mobile sessions.
defaultPrompt: Use $overlay-playwright-runtime to vendor a11y-overlay into this repo.
Use $overlay-playwright-runtime to inspect this site in a persistent Playwright session.
Capture an overlay failure package for this broken flow.
